data.description: According to Mainichi, a Japanese health panel has approved Sumitomo Pharma’s iPS cell-based therapy for Parkinson’s.

data.title: SWI Capital Holding lists on Euronext Amsterdam with 430,561,189 existing shares under symbol "SWICH".
data.description: Today, SWI Capital Holding, the parent company of Stoneweg Icona Group, is set to officially list its shares on the Amsterdam Euronext Stock Exchange. The shares will trade under the symbol "SWICH." The listing includes a total of 430,561,189 existing shares. Those interested can access the prospectus for further information on the offering.

data.title: Neolix becomes first globally to surpass 100M km in autonomous operations, leading in RoboVan sector.
data.description: Neolix, a prominent provider of L4 autonomous logistics solutions, revealed today that its fleet of autonomous vehicles has exceeded a remarkable milestone by covering over 100 million kilometers in actual driving scenarios. This achievement positions Neolix as the pioneering company in the RoboVan sector to reach such a significant milestone.

data.title: Micro LED display revenue set to double to $105 million by 2026, driven by smart watches and public displays.
data.description: In London, Micro LED display revenue is forecasted to double year-over-year, rising from $52.4 million in 2025 to $105.4 million in 2026, as per the Omdia Micro LED Display Market Tracker. Although Micro LED displays for public display, ultra-large TVs, smart watches, and smart glasses are currently constrained, advancements in manufacturing technology and increased product integration are anticipated to spur notable growth in shipments and revenue in the near future. data.title: Nokken acquires Space of Mind to expand into wellness design, featuring innovative modular cabins from Finland.
data.description: In London on February 19, 2026, Nokken revealed the acquisition of Space of Mind, a renowned Cabin company from Finland known for its cutting-edge modular cabin collection. This move serves to broaden Nokken's portfolio into the realm of wellness-oriented practices and rejuvenation. The acquisition will bring significant changes to the brand's offerings as it ventures into providing rituals and recovery solutions.

data.title: Boyd to feature liquid cooling solutions at Data Centre World London 2026 on 4-5 March, advancing Europe's AI infrastructure.
data.description: London, 19th February 2026 - Boyd, a prominent provider of energy-efficient cooling technologies worldwide, is set to showcase their advanced liquid cooling solutions at Data Centre World London 2026. The event will take place on 4th to 5th March 2026 at ExCeL London. Boyd's innovative solutions aim to enhance Europe's AI infrastructure by offering scalable and high-performance cooling systems. This move highlights the company's commitment to promoting energy efficiency in data centers.

data.title: Halfpricesoft.com promotes ez1095 ACA Software for 1095 deadlines. Simplifies 1095/1094-C & 1095/1094-B prep, printing, e-filing.
data.description: A comprehensive platform is now available to streamline the preparation, printing, and e-filing of 1095/1094-C and 1095/1094-B forms for businesses. Halfpricesoft.com from REDMOND, Wash., announced on Feb. 19, 2026, that they are offering this solution to assist businesses in staying compliant with the Affordable Care Act (ACA). This platform is crucial as important reporting deadlines approach, and it ensures efficient IRS and state e-filing.

data.title: Varaha launches VIPP program to scale biochar carbon removal in Côte d'Ivoire. Global initiative enables biomass facilities to generate carbon credits. (288 chars)
data.description: In Gurugram, India, Varaha has announced the launch of the Varaha Industrial Partners Program (VIPP) on February 19, 2026. This global initiative aims to assist biomass processing facilities in obtaining sustainable biomass feedstocks to produce high-integrity carbon removal credits via Varaha's platform.

data.title: Global white oil market to reach 1.69 Mn tons by 2031, APAC holding 63.44% in 2025, with CAGR of 1.36%.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent report from Mordor Intelligence reveals that the global white oil market is anticipated to increase from 1.58 million tons in 2026 to 1.69 million tons by 2031. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 1.36% over the forecast period. The report highlights a positive trajectory for the market in the coming years.
US Energy Secretary emphasizes that the U.S. is the most reliable source of energy.

data.title: Money Expo Mexico 2026 begins in Latin America with over 700 companies and 5,000 visitors in attendance, marking a historic turnout.
data.description: The 4th edition of Money Expo Mexico 2026 started in Mexico City on Feb. 19 with over 700 companies and 5,000 visitors attending on Day-1 at Centro Banamex, CDMX. Participants include traders, introducing brokers, affiliates, investors, fintech leaders, and market experts.

data.title: Biodegradable packaging market to hit $24.2B (6.1% CAGR) by 2036. PLA leads at 41%, food packaging in demand at 40%. Hotspots: China, India, Germany.
data.description: According to a report by Future Market Insights (FMI), it is projected that the biodegradable packaging market will reach a value of USD 13.4 billion by 2026. The industry is expected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.1% through 2036, surpassing USD 24.2 billion by the end of the mentioned period.
